---
title : "A Multidimensional Approach for Measuring Meritocratic Beliefs: Advantages, Limitations and Alternatives to the ISSP Social Inequality Survey"
date : "2023-11-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Iturra, Julio; Maldonado, Luis; Atria, Jorge & Meneses, Francisco"
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "International Journal of Sociology, 53(6) 448--472  [https://doi.org/10.1080/00207659.2023.2274712](https://doi.org/10.1080/00207659.2023.2274712)"
publication_short : "International Journal of Sociology, 53(6) 448--472  [https://doi.org/10.1080/00207659.2023.2274712](https://doi.org/10.1080/00207659.2023.2274712)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Iturra, Julio; Maldonado, Luis; Atria, Jorge & Meneses, Francisco (2023). *A Multidimensional Approach for Measuring Meritocratic Beliefs: Advantages, Limitations and Alternatives to the ISSP Social Inequality Survey*. International Journal of Sociology, 53(6) 448--472  [https://doi.org/10.1080/00207659.2023.2274712](https://doi.org/10.1080/00207659.2023.2274712)

:::
